name: x402 Launch Re-check
description: Private no-payment re-check of one x402 manifest, paid endpoint, or launch PR after you apply a fix. You get a concise pass/fail note, remaining blockers, and a clean public wording option if you want to co-promote the result.

surface_url.description: Public manifest, endpoint, docs page, GitHub PR, or issue URL to re-check.

authorized_scope.description: Confirm the review is authorized and limited to public/no-payment checks unless you explicitly provide a test fixture.

previous_context_url.description: Optional previous finding, PR comment, issue, or report URL.

contact_email.description: Best email for private delivery and follow-up questions.

notes.description: Anything you changed and want checked first.

summary.description: Pass/fail result with the main launch risk.

remaining_blockers.description: Remaining items to fix, if any.

public_wording_option.description: Optional short public note for mutual sign-off.

name: x402 Launch Review
description: Private launch-readiness review for an x402, Pay.sh, or agent-payment surface. Covers manifest/discovery shape, 402 challenge behavior, resource binding, price/rail consistency, browser-agent CORS, cache controls, payment metadata exposure, and patch order.

project_url.description: Main project, docs, repo, or launch PR URL.

surface_url.description: Primary x402 manifest, OpenAPI document, paid endpoint, or registry PR to review.

authorized_scope.description: Confirm authorized public/no-payment review scope and list any test endpoints you permit.

expected_price_or_network.description: Expected price, token, network, facilitator, or rail if known.

contact_email.description: Best email for private report delivery.

notes.description: Launch deadline, known concerns, or areas to skip.

spend_map.description: What an agent can pay for, expected limits, and observed challenge behavior.

findings.description: Prioritized launch blockers and trust gaps.

patch_order.description: Suggested implementation order for fastest safe launch.

name: x402 Fix Sprint
description: Small authorized implementation sprint for one x402 launch blocker: manifest/discovery cleanup, CORS/payment-header readability, cache-control fixes, resource URL binding, docs/OpenAPI alignment, or CI gate setup. Includes one follow-up re-check.

repo_url.description: GitHub repo URL or private access instructions if already arranged outside the marketplace.

surface_url.description: Public endpoint, manifest, docs page, OpenAPI doc, or PR showing the blocker.

blocker_type.description: The main blocker you want fixed.

authorized_scope.description: Confirm the repo/surface is yours or you have authorization, and describe exactly what can be changed.

contact_email.description: Best email for private delivery and clarification.

notes.description: Branch, framework, deadlines, test commands, or review expectations.

verification.description: Commands, probes, or URLs used to verify the fix.

follow_up_recheck.description: Result of the included follow-up re-check.
